description: Reused verbatim from src/features/knowledge-engine's own closed vocabulary for this domain. Source of truth: src/features/knowledge-engine/types/vocabularies.ts → CUSTOMER_TYPE_KEYS. NOTE: this is a different, finer-grained vocabulary from business-engine's SalesChannel (b2b/b2c/both — see sales-channels.json's description for why that name is NOT what this file is about).
